fun plan(repoRoot: String, baseRef: String, headRef: String): DocsCoherenceVerdict {
    val contextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val contextMaintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val changedFiles = gitChangedFiles(repoRoot, baseRef, headRef)
    val sourceDiff = gitDiff(repoRoot, baseRef, headRef)
    val touchedDomains = inferTouchedDomains(changedFiles, repoIndex)
    val relevantContextDocs = readRepoContextForDomains(repoRoot, touchedDomains)
    val repositoryDocs = listFiles(repoRoot, listOf("README*", "docs/**", "*.md", ".repo_context/**/*.md"))
    val changedDocs = filterDocumentationFiles(changedFiles)
    val changedDocDiff = filterDiffForFiles(sourceDiff, changedDocs)
    val codeImpact = classifyChangeForDocumentationNeed(sourceDiff, changedFiles, engineeringPrinciples)
    val relevantDocFiles = selectRelevantDocumentation(repositoryDocs, touchedDomains, sourceDiff, contextIndex)
    val relevantDocContents = readFiles(relevantDocFiles)
    val existingReferences = searchDocsForChangedConcepts(repoRoot, codeImpact, relevantDocFiles)
    val coherenceFindings = compareDocsToDiff(codeImpact, changedDocDiff, relevantDocContents, existingReferences, relevantContextDocs, contextMaintenance)
    val verdict = buildDocsCoherenceVerdict(codeImpact, changedDocs, coherenceFindings)
    return makeResult(verdict)
}
